name: resend-setup
description: Resend domain setup and DNS automation

scripts.setup: npm run create-domain && cd terraform && terraform init && terraform apply
scripts.check-dns: echo 'Checking DNS propagation...' && nslookup -type=TXT resend._domainkey.notifications.jakob-lingel.dev && nslookup -type=TXT send.notifications.jakob-lingel.dev && nslookup -type=MX send.notifications.jakob-lingel.dev
